characters.description: A human separated from his companions when Earth enters the multiverse. Zac survives a personalized System lottery against a herald and loses consciousness after the improbable victory.
characters.name: Zac

characters.description: A temporary System guide assigned to Zac's newly activated outpost. She identifies him as a rare defier and explains tutorial placement, cosmic energy, and his unusual position outside normal cultivation.
characters.name: Stargazer outpost administrator

characters.description: A Clan Azh'Rezak commander presented by his scouts as the privileged general directing the island invasion. His forces include organized demon soldiers and beast hordes, making him the central figure behind the incursion Zac must overcome.
characters.name: Ogras

characters.description: A well-supplied main-branch heir of Clan Azh'Rezak. Ogras suspects that Rydel was assigned to watch or eliminate him, making the clan's internal rivalry another danger within the invasion.
characters.name: Rydel

characters.description: A missing member of Zac's tutorial group. Zac believes Hannah may have died or may have returned somewhere other than his camp, but he has no confirmation of her fate.
characters.name: Hannah

characters.description: A lava-veined monkey found meditating beneath an anomalous scarlet tree in a secluded valley. Zac regards the figure as the likely stone-monkey herald.
characters.name: Monkey King

characters.description: The Monkey King identified by Eye of Discernment as a level-58 herald. Cindermane wields heat and stone and calls buried stone-monkey forces when Zac threatens the scarlet tree.
characters.name: Cindermane

characters.description: A large, intelligent, four-eyed imp in robes who commands other imps and operates a guarded cauldron. Zac identifies it as the probable fourth herald.
characters.name: Imp herald

characters.description: A surviving demon civilian whose costly language skill allows communication across races. She had pursued a merchant-oriented path and explains why some failed invaders remained on Earth rather than return to Clan Azh'Rezak.
characters.name: Demon scribe

characters.description: A creator golem and foreman of Zac's newly acquired shipyard. Karunthel oversees its permitted work, explains that it is intended for naval exploration, and helps arrange a disguise that presents the extraordinary facility as an ordinary human dock.
characters.name: Karunthel

characters.description: The leader trying to preserve the Thayer Consortium's last licensed branch. Facing the organization's imminent loss, the chairman seeks to establish its headquarters in Zac's settlement despite limited supplies and bargaining power.
characters.name: Thayer Consortium chairman

characters.description: Zac's tutor in the System, cultivation, and the wider multiverse.
characters.name: Alan

characters.description: One of four powerful associates revealed as Ogras's hidden retainers rather than ordinary Clan Azh'Rezak troops. Ilvir follows a Strongman path and pursues contrasting insights into Heaviness and Lightness.
characters.name: Ilvir

characters.description: One of Ogras's four concealed retainers, Janos is a support mage whose illusions can hide people and influence a battlefield. His specialized assistance gives Port Atwood's defenders options beyond direct force.
characters.name: Janos

characters.description: One of Ogras's four hidden retainers and a shadow-using assassin. Namis is introduced among the experienced demon fighters secretly loyal to Ogras and available for the approaching defense of Port Atwood.
characters.name: Namis

characters.description: A poison specialist and one of Ogras's concealed retainers. Alea is a dangerous fighter who shows a personal interest in Zac, which he regards cautiously.
characters.name: Alea

characters.description: Zac's younger sister, now living in Kingsbury with Lila. Mackenzie recognizes the ladder name Super Brother Man as a signal from her brother and learns that he survived, though neither sibling knows where the other is.
characters.name: Mackenzie

characters.description: Mackenzie's companion and a survivor of the tutorial. Lila lives with her in coercively ruled Kingsbury and accompanies her on an investigation of an expanding undead threat, partly as a way to escape local danger.
characters.name: Lila

characters.description: A Marshall clan member with a rare class suited to the wilderness. Thea is among Earth's leading ladder rankers and considers taking another quest to improve her position against the people above her.
characters.name: Thea Marshall

characters.description: A separate ladder-ranked local leader defending Billyville from rat-like monsters emerging through an incursion. Billy's public ranking reflects an independent center of resistance elsewhere on the transformed Earth.
characters.name: Billy

characters.description: A castaway from Chicago who was vacationing in Vietnam when the Integration displaced her group. Megan is among twelve low-level survivors who reach Port Atwood after fleeing an island overrun by enlarged rats.
characters.name: Megan

characters.description: The castellan of Winterleaf Village and leader of the party that receives Zac. Selas represents a weak fawn-like settlement seeking outside help and warns that the nearest human community is controlled by a violent warlord.
characters.name: Selas

characters.description: The cultivator ruler of Fort Roger, where armed men, vehicles, and fuel are kept under his control. He is implicated in the torture and execution of a couple who tried to remove their daughter from the settlement.
characters.name: Roger

characters.description: A teenage survivor of Fort Roger whose parents were executed on Roger's orders. Too young to enter the System, Emily is determined to gain power and chooses to travel with Zac after he recovers her parents' bodies for burial.
characters.name: Emily

characters.description: Emily's older sister, a cultivator who vanished from the family home during the Integration. Her location remains unknown when Emily joins Zac.
characters.name: Joanna

characters.description: Emily's older brother, a cultivator who vanished from the family home during the Integration. His location remains unknown when Emily joins Zac.
characters.name: Oscar

characters.description: The spokesman for older fishing-village arrivals at Port Atwood. Sap Trang offers his group's maritime experience, willingness to cultivate, and productive labor in exchange for resources and a place in the new settlement.
characters.name: Sap Trang

characters.description: A demon fire specialist whose spreading flames are especially effective against the Ein Hive Beasts during Port Atwood’s second horde.
characters.name: Demon pyromancer

characters.description: A demon earth mage selected for the six-person force entering the Hive Queen. The scout uses tremor perception to detect threats within the living structure.
characters.name: Earth-mage scout

characters.description: The earth mage who accompanied the strike force into the Hive Queen. Herod is found dead after the hive seals a tunnel and crushes him near the group’s exit.
characters.name: Herod
